facebook.caption:
POV: you finally find the crab spot locals keep returning to.

Si's Crab House on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. 1,741 reviews. 4.3 stars. Fresh seafood cooked right, no shortcuts.

Budget around $40-80 per person. Worth every dong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cracking open fresh crab at Si's Crab House. 1,741 people reviewed this place for a reason. Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Khu 1. Go hungry.
